response_text:
You're right! That's exactly what the memory reminder was doing - injecting a simple note like "Consider checking MEMORY.md."

We removed the AI processing part (qwen searching memory) but also removed the reminder injection entirely.

**We could bring back just the simple reminder:**

```
User: "What do you remember about X?"
→ chat_monitor detects "remember"
→ injects: "[Reminder] Consider: grep 'X' MEMORY.md"
→ I see it, run grep, answer better
```

No AI. Just a keyword trigger + grep reminder.

Want me to add that back? Much simpler than the full memory recall system - just injects "grep TOPIC MEMORY.md" when I say "remember".
